posts.author: TheQuantBros
posts.text: Looking for Expired F&O Data (India) — i got the data from dhan, they are providing 1min data, thats enough for backtesting my current strategy since i am focusing on byuing so directional strategies are better to work on also saving tick data and greeks, so future scalp strategy testing etc, if needed older data will consider to buy tick data from any vendor

posts.author: yaaramanil_kumar
posts.text: Looking for Expired F&O Data (India) — For Indian F&O historical data, a few options depending on your budget: Free: NSE website has bhavcopy files (end-of-day OHLC for all F&O contracts) going back several years. Tedious to compile but free. nsearchives.nseindia.com Zerodha’s historical data API (if you have Kite Connect subscription) — minute-level data for active contracts, but expired strikes are limited Paid: Opstra / Sensibull — options historical data with IV, Greeks included True Data — tick and minute level F&O data, reliable Global Data Feeds — good for bulk historical downloads For…
